info: Extra help can be given here to help you learn a card better
prompt: Welcome to your "Next Language" app. Swipe right ______ ______
answer: Welcome to your "Next Language" app. Swipe right Swiping left or right shows the rest of the card.  Swipe right Swiping left or right shows the rest of the card.  Swipe right
goal_words: Swiping left or right shows the rest of the card.  Swipe right

info: Extra help can be given here to help you learn a card better
prompt: This is the next card.  swipe again. ______ ______
answer: This is the next card.  swipe again. Every time you swipe on a card it is counted. Every time you swipe on a card it is counted.
goal_words: Every time you swipe on a card it is counted.

info: Extra help can be given here to help you learn a card better
prompt: Swiping right means you understand or know the answer. ______,______ ______,______
answer: Swiping right means you understand or know the answer. Swiping left means you don't, and you need more practice. Swiping left means you don't, and you need more practice.
goal_words: Swiping left means you don't,  and you need more practice.

info: Extra help can be given here to help you learn a card better
prompt: After you swipe right, the card is 'learned' and removed from the practice list. ______ ______
answer: After you swipe right, the card is 'learned' and removed from the practice list. You can change this number in the settings. You can change this number in the settings.
goal_words: You can change this number in the settings.

info:
Download and practice any list you like.  The levels are there as a rough guide to help you decide.
Level 1 - letters and sounds
Level 2 - simple words and phrases
Level 3 - sentences in various tenses
Level 4 - long form and reading
Level 5 - advanced grammar
prompt: Go to "get lists" to download lessons and vocab lists. ______ ______
answer: Go to "get lists" to download lessons and vocab lists. Choose which ones to practice right now in "edit lists". Choose which ones to practice right now in "edit lists".
goal_words: Choose which ones to practice right now in "edit lists".
